text:
There once was an old wise owl that lived high up in an ancient oak tree.

Every year owlets came down begging stories.

"You want tales?"

Oh please!

You'll listen?

Sure.

Every evening they'd come.

One day little owl wanted a boyfriend.

So went searching far and wide.

Flew south, flew north.

Every animal he talked flew away.

Except goose.

 goose liked big tale.

So day goose told big tale.

And owl sat there for weeks.

Then goose flew away.

Owl owl owl owl.

That's today owl owl that tells tales.



Maybe I'll tell you fox one?

You think?

Why would fox?

We're mates.


Listen fox I had dreams.

Dreamed I played cricket.

Caught every ball.



But bats?

Hit me.



That day fox owl flew.

Just never thought I'd spar.



Anyway owl?

Why bats?

Because good.

That's why.


I like bats.



That story owl.



Any others?

Something about lions.

They
